scripts.build: rimraf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && pnpm run copy
scripts.build:docs: rimraf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && pnpm run docs:ci && pnpm run copy
scripts.check: pnpm audit && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm test && pnpm run build && bash scripts/check-server-start.sh
scripts.check:fix: pnpm install && pnpm audit --fix && pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm test && pnpm run build && bash scripts/check-server-start.sh
scripts.check:naf: pnpm install && pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix && pnpm test && pnpm run build && bash scripts/check-server-start.sh
scripts.copy: pnpm run copy:assets && pnpm run copy:config && pnpm run copy:extras && pnpm run copy:meta && pnpm run copy:migrations && pnpm run copy:public && pnpm run copy:scripts && pnpm run copy:spectaql
scripts.docs: pnpm run docs:ci && open http://127.0.0.1:8080/ && open ./public/index.html && compodoc -p tsconfig.json -s
scripts.docs:ci: ts-node ./scripts/init-server.ts && pnpm run docs:bootstrap && compodoc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.reinit: rimraf pnpm-lock.yaml && rimraf node_modules && pnpm install && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run build
scripts.reinit:clean: rimraf pnpm-lock.yaml && rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune && pnpm install && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run build
scripts.start: pnpm run migrate:up && pnpm run start:local
scripts.test:cleanup: find tests -type f \( -name '*.txt' -o -name '*.bin' \) -not -name '.gitkeep' -delete && echo 'Test artifacts cleaned up'

//overrides.@apollo/server: Prevents peerDep conflict: @nestjs/apollo pulls in @apollo/server-plugin-landing-page-graphql-playground@4.0.1 (peerDep @apollo/server@^4), conflicting with @lenne.tech/nest-server requiring v5. Update this value when nest-server changes its @apollo/server version. Remove once the playground plugin accepts v5. Also: security fix CVE in @apollo/server <5.5.0.
//overrides.axios: Security fix: SSRF via NO_PROXY bypass (GHSA-3p68-rc4w-qgx5) and Cloud Metadata Exfiltration via Header Injection (GHSA-fvcv-3m26-pcqx) in axios <1.15.0 - transitive via @lenne.tech/nest-server>@getbrevo/brevo and >node-mailjet. Updated to latest 1.15.2.
//overrides.hono: Security fix: Multiple CVEs including Prototype Pollution in hono <4.12.7 - transitive via @lenne.tech/nest-server>@nestjs/terminus>prisma>@prisma/dev
//overrides.file-type: Security fix: Infinite loop in ASF parser in file-type >=13.0.0 <21.3.2 - transitive via @swc/cli>@xhmikosr/bin-wrapper>@xhmikosr/downloader
//overrides.@hono/node-server: Security fix: Authorization bypass CVE in @hono/node-server <1.19.10 - transitive via @lenne.tech/nest-server>@nestjs/terminus>prisma>@prisma/dev. Updated to latest 1.19.14 (latest 1.x; 2.x is major).
//overrides.vite: Security fix: Multiple CVEs in vite >=7.0.0 <=7.3.1 (arbitrary file read via WebSocket, fs.deny bypass, path traversal in .map handling) - transitive via vite-plugin-node
//overrides.lodash: Security fix: Code Injection and Prototype Pollution in lodash <=4.17.23 - transitive via multiple chains. Updated to 4.18.1.
//overrides.ajv: Security fix: ReDoS vulnerability in ajv >=7.0.0-alpha.0 <8.18.0 - transitive via @compodoc/compodoc>@angular-devkit/schematics>@angular-devkit/core
//overrides.srvx: Security fix: CVE in srvx <0.11.13 - transitive via @lenne.tech/nest-server>@tus/server. Note: @tus/server@2.3.0 still pins srvx to ~0.8.2 so override is needed.
//overrides.picomatch: Security fix: ReDoS via extglob quantifiers in picomatch >=4.0.0 <4.0.4 - transitive via @compodoc/compodoc>@angular-devkit/schematics>@angular-devkit/core
//overrides.effect: Security fix: AsyncLocalStorage context contamination in effect <3.20.0 - transitive via @lenne.tech/nest-server>prisma>@prisma/config. Updated to latest 3.21.2.
//overrides.drizzle-orm: Security fix: SQL injection via improperly escaped SQL identifiers in drizzle-orm <0.45.2 (GHSA-gpj5-g38j-94v9) - transitive via @lenne.tech/nest-server>better-auth
//overrides.uuid: Security fix: Missing buffer bounds check in uuid v3/v5/v6 generators when buf is provided, in uuid <14.0.0 (GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq) - transitive via @compodoc/compodoc (uuid 11.1.0) and @compodoc/compodoc>@compodoc/live-server>http-auth (uuid >=8.3.2 <12). http-auth only uses uuid.v4 which is API-stable across 8-14, so the override is safe.
